mission.title: gitea: Support Actions `concurrency` syntax
mission.description:
Fix #24769
Fix #32662
Fix #33260

Depends on https://gitea.com/gitea/act/pulls/124

- https://docs.github.com/en/actions/writing-workflows/workflow-syntax-for-github-actions#concurrency

## âš ď¸Ź BREAKING âš ď¸Ź

This PR removes the auto-cancellation feature added by #25716. Users need to manually add `concurrency` to workflows to control concurrent workflows or jobs.

steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description:
Fix #24769

Fix #33260

Depends on https://gitea.com/gitea/act/pulls/124

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

concurrency:
  group: example-group
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  job-1:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo 'test1' && sleep 60
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/pull/33280. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
Move the main logic of `generateTaskContext` and `findTaskNeeds` to the `services` layer.

This is a part of #32751, since we need the git context and `needs` to parse the concurrency expressions.
codeSnippets:
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

concurrency:
  group: example-group
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  job-1:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo 'test1' && sleep 60

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

concurrency:
  group: example-group
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  job-1:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo 'test1' && sleep 60

> on:
>   push:
>     branches:
>       - main
> 
> concurrency:
>   group: example-group
>   cancel-in-progress: true
> 
> jobs:
>   job-1:
>     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
>     steps:
>       - run: echo 'test1' && sleep 60
>

on: push
concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true
jobs:
  test:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        no:
        - 1
        - 2
        - 3
        - 4
        - 5
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Run tests
      run: |
        echo ${{ github.run_id }} > "/tmp/test.txt"
    - uses: christopherhx/gitea-upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        path: test.txt
        name: test
invalid jobs: yaml: unmarshal errors:\n  line 4: cannot unmarshal !!str `test` into model.RawConcurrency

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with gitea installed or the issue environment reproducible.
